name: Hundred-Dollar Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift or stir the dry ingredients (flour, sugar, baking powder, baking soda, and cocoa) together in a large bowl.
2. Mix the liquids (water, Miracle Whip®, vanilla) well in a separate bowl.
3. Gradually add the liquid mixture to the dry ingredients and mix until just combined.
4. Bake the cake for 35 minutes at 350°F (175°C).
5. For the frosting: Boil the sugar, cocoa, milk, and butter together for 1 minute.
6. Stir the boiling mixture until it is partly cool.
7. Add 2 teaspoons of vanilla to the cooled frosting mixture.
